title: Daily Life & Communication Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.
choices: mail
language
agree
rounds.answer: mail
rounds.explanation: mail: Letters and packages that are sent or delivered.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The hard work you put into doing something.
choices: mail
language
effort

rounds.explanation: effort: The hard work you put into doing something.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Treating everyone equally and in the same way.
choices: language
fair
mail
rounds.answer: fair
rounds.explanation: fair: Treating everyone equally and in the same way.
